Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked
Vehicle Speed Sensor "A" signal amplitude > maximum
The coding of the control unit is incorrect. Invalid / Incompatible Configuration
The squib for the driver airbag (stage 1) has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the driver airbag (stage 2) has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for switchable exhaust vent Driver" has a malfunction." circuit short to ground
The squib for the driver kneebag has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the front passenger airbag (stage 1) has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the front passenger airbag (stage 2) has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for switchable exhaust vent Front passenger" has a malfunction." circuit short to ground
The squib for the front passenger kneebag has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the sidebag ''front left'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the left windowbag/headbag has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the left rear windowbag has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the sidebag ''front right'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the right windowbag/headbag has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the right rear windowbag has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the left rear sidebag has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the right rear sidebag has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The belt buckle ''rear left'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The belt buckle ''rear center'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The belt buckle ''rear right'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
Belt tension sensor "Passenger side" has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The left front crash sensor has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The crash sensor ''Left front door'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The crash sensor on the left-hand side has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The right front crash sensor has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The crash sensor ''Right front door'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The crash sensor on the right-hand side has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
Occupant Classificatio System (Subfault). General Electric failure
The position sensor ''Driver seat'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The position sensor ''Front passenger seat'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
Restraint System Malfunction Indicator 1 (Subfault) signal stuck low
Restraint System Passenger Disable Indicator (Subfault) circuit short to ground
Passenger Restraints Disable Switch has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the left rear emergency tensioning retractor has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the right rear emergency tensioning retractor has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the center rear emergency tensioning retractor has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for emergency tensioner "Belt end fitting" (front left) has malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for emergency tensioner "Belt end fitting" (front right) has malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for emergency tensioner "front left" has malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for emergency tensioner "front right" has malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for belt force limiter left has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for belt force limiter right has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The belt buckle ''front left'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The belt buckle ''front right'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
Seat occupied detection "passenger" has a malfunction circuit short to ground
The control unit is not locked. not activated
Airbag ON Lamp circuit short to battery
The seat occupied recognition ''Front passenger'' has a malfunction. incorrect component installed
The event data recorder has a malfunction. not programmed
The drive authorization data are implausible. signal plausibility failure
The configuration of the steering variant is faulty. signal plausibility failure
The squib for the left roll bar has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the right roll bar has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
Undetermined Squib circuit short to battery
The squib for the left engine hood lifter has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the right engine hood lifter has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for pyrofuse ''On-board electrical network line'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The left sensor for function ''Active engine hood'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The right sensor for function ''Active engine hood'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for the pedestrian airbag has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
The squib for pyrofuse ''High-voltage on-board electrical system'' has a malfunction. circuit short to ground
High Speed CAN Communication Bus bus off
Communication with the engine control unit has a malfunction. missing message
Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module missing message
Lost Communication With Body Control Module missing message
Lost Communication With Restraints Control Module missing message
Communication with the instrument cluster has a malfunction. missing message
Invalid Data Received From Instrument Panel Cluster Control Module unexpected operation
Invalid Data Received From "Seat Control Module C" signal invalid
Invalid Data Received From "Seat Control Module D" signal invalid
LIN Circuit (the master (ORC) is unable to see its own messages on the bus) short GND
ECU Application Software Data 1 Missing or Corrupted program memory failure
The power supply has a malfunction. circuit voltage below threshold

Item.Text: No Crash Detection Out Of Order
Only faults reports and alerts that MUST remain active during cranking or sleeping periods are enabled
All faults reports and alerts not related to APC power level are enabled
All faults reports and alerts are enabled
Diag result : AIRBAG Malfunction lamp OFF
Diag result : AIRBAG Malfunction lamp ON

Data.Name: Occupant detection passenger fast (Only for use with seat belt reminder)

Item.Text: Msg. Low weight recognized - Psg. Airbag disabledl
Msg. Psg. Airbag enabled, refer to manual

Data.Name: Child protection and orientation detection status

Item.Text: IEE Occupant Detection/Automatic Child Seat Detection version 1 / IEE_PPD_CPOD_V1
IEE Weight Sensing System version 1 / IEE_WSS_V1
Delphi Weight Sensing System version 1 / DELPHI_WSS_V1
Bizerba Weight Sensing System version 1 / BIZERBA_WSS_V1

Data.Name: Shall be set in case of BTSs Vref has short to Vbatt
Shall be set in case of BTSs Vref has short to GND
Shall be set in case of BTS jammed
Shall be set in case of open BTS
Shall be set in case of signal has short to GND
Shall be set in case of signal has short to Vbatt
Vbatt is below 8V (min. LIN operating voltage)
Missing seat EOL calibration or EOL checksum fault
Missing plattform specific calibration or cal chksum fault
Shall be set in case of a leacked bladder
Shall be set in case of an faulty accelerometer
Shall be set in case of ruptured pressor sensor
All other internal faults which are not shown in this table shall set this bit

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory
